user_stories.title: Topic Trend Visualization
user_stories.i_want_to: see how the frequency of a topic has changed over time
user_stories.so_that: I can spot rising trends or fading buzzwords.
acceptance_criteria: Aggregate mentions of key terms/entities by episode publish date.
Render Line/Area charts showing frequency over time.
Allow comparison of multiple terms (e.g., 'Remote Work' vs 'Hybrid').
